# mtncloud_contact (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud monitoring contact by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_contact" "oncall" {
  name = "on-call"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the contact to look up.

### Read-Only

- `email_address` (String) Email notification address.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the contact.
- `slack_hook` (String) Slack incoming-webhook URL.
- `sms_address` (String) SMS notification address.
